helpful: The provisioned petition included both lower-court opinions.
The statpack supplied fee-class, circuit, CVSG, and relist calibration.
CourtListener MCP made it possible to compare the asserted circuit authorities without searching this case's disposition.
gaps: The current statpack lacked the salience-band table referenced by the predictor prompt.
Passage-level opinion retrieval would avoid oversized full-opinion payloads.
notes: Corpus queries were useful mainly for procedural comparators because the available structured filters do not support subject-matter similarity for SCOTUS rows.
